clearMessageWarning: Please be advised that by submitting this message, all subsequent messages will be deleted!
clearConversationWarning: Please be advised that by confirming this action, all messages will be deleted!
author: Made by Jing Hua
name: Name
findScopeAllNodes: Search all nodes including hidden branches
typeToSearchContent: Type to search across all chat content
openrouterVerificationPending: OpenRouter verified usage will be checked shortly.
openrouterVerificationFailed: OpenRouter verified usage is not available yet.

branchEditorMenu.pruneConfirm: Delete all hidden nodes? This can be undone with Undo.

morePrompts: You can find more prompts here:
exportVisibleBranchOnly: Include only the currently visible branch
proxyDescription: Route AI response streams and safety evaluation through a proxy server. This may allow recovery of generated responses when the network connection is interrupted, and lets browser-based safety evaluation avoid CORS limits.
submitPlaceholder: Type a message or click [/] for prompts...
stopNonStreamGenerationWarning: Stopping generation is not recommended for non-stream models. Only use it if UI is stuck. Do you want to proceed?
reduceMessagesWarning: Reducing messages may result in data loss. It is recommended to download the chat in JSON format if you care about the data. Do you want to proceed?
reduceMessagesFailedImportWarning: Full import failed as the data hit the maximum storage limit. Import as much as possible?
partialImportWarning: Full import failed as not all of the expected messages were imported: {{message}}. Would you like to import anyway?
reduceMessagesSuccess: Successfully reduced messages. {{count}} messages were removed.
hiddenMessagesWarning: Some messages were hidden with the total length of {{hiddenTokens}} tokens to {{reduceMessagesToTotalToken}} tokens to avoid laggy UI.
branchDisabledTooltip: Branching is only available below user messages
branchGenerateTooltip: Duplicate this message into a new branch and generate the continuation there
branchOnlyTooltip: Duplicate this message into a new branch and open that branch in edit mode
regenerateNextTooltip: Overwrite this message and regenerate only the next response. Everything after that stays unchanged
regenerateBelowTooltip: Overwrite this message, delete everything below it, and generate again starting with the next response
storageQuotaExceeded: Storage quota exceeded. Your changes could not be saved

welcome.title: Welcome to Weavelet Canvas
welcome.description: A powerful chat interface that connects to multiple AI providers. Set up your API key and start chatting in minutes. (API keys are stored in your browser. You can also sync them to your Google Drive.)

apiSetup.title: Set Up Your AI Provider
apiSetup.description: To get started, you'll need an API key from at least one AI provider.
apiSetup.hint: Click "Next" below to open the provider settings where you can add your API key and select models.

modelSelection.title: Choose Your Models
modelSelection.description: After adding your API key, browse and add models to your favorites for quick access.
modelSelection.hint: You can add models from the star icon in the provider menu. Your favorites will appear in the chat model selector.

gettingStarted.title: You're All Set!
gettingStarted.tip1: Type a message in the input box and press Enter to send
gettingStarted.tip2: Use [/] to access the prompt library for quick templates
gettingStarted.tip3: Create branches to explore different conversation paths
gettingStarted.tip4: Access settings from the left sidebar menu

ops.newChat: Click the "+" button in the sidebar to start a new chat
ops.selectModel: Use the model selector at the top of the chat to switch AI models
ops.promptLibrary: Click [/] in the input area to browse prompt templates
ops.branch: Use branching to explore alternative conversation paths

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: How do I add an API key?
faq.a1: Open the provider settings from the sidebar, select your provider, and enter your API key.
faq.a2: Click the model name at the top of the chat area to select from your favorite models.

evaluation.description: Safety evaluation uses the OpenAI Moderation API. In browser environments, a stream proxy is required because of OpenAI cross-origin resource sharing (CORS) restrictions. Quality evaluation asks the model currently in use for each chat to evaluate the content.
evaluation.safetyDescription: Safety evaluation uses the OpenAI Moderation API. In browser environments, a stream proxy is required because of OpenAI cross-origin resource sharing (CORS) restrictions.
evaluation.qualityDescription: Quality evaluation asks the model currently in use for each chat to evaluate the content.

invalidAuthentication.title: 401 Invalid Authentication
invalidAuthentication.description: The API key or organization ID is incorrect.

incorrectApiKey.title: 401 Incorrect API key provided
incorrectApiKey.description: The API key is incorrect, expired, or disabled.

orgMembershipRequired.title: 401 You must be a member of an organization to use the API
orgMembershipRequired.description: The user account is not a member of an organization.

rateLimitReached.title: 429 Rate limit reached for requests
rateLimitReached.description: The number of requests allowed within a certain time window has been exceeded.
rateLimitReached.tip: Tip: Free accounts may hit this more easily. If your API account is still on the free tier, adding $5 of prepaid credit can qualify it for Tier 1 and may improve available limits.

quotaExceeded.title: 429 You exceeded your current quota, please check your plan and billing details
quotaExceeded.description: The user-configured monthly usage limit has been exceeded.
quotaExceeded.tip: Tip: If the API account is still on the free tier, adding $5 of prepaid credit can qualify it for Tier 1. Also check monthly budget and billing settings in the OpenAI dashboard.

serverError.title: 500 The server had an error while proceeding your request
serverError.description: An issue occurred on OpenAI's server side.

engineOverloaded.title: 503 The engine is currently overloaded, please try again later
engineOverloaded.description: OpenAI's server is currently under high load.

modelNotSelected.title: Model not selected
modelNotSelected.description: A model must be selected to run quality evaluation. Please select a model from the model selector.

apiKeyRequired.title: OpenAI API key not configured
apiKeyRequired.description: An OpenAI API key is required for safety evaluation. Please configure it in Settings > Providers > OpenAI.

proxyNotConfigured.title: Proxy not configured
proxyNotConfigured.description: Safety evaluation requires a Stream Proxy. Please configure the proxy URL in Settings > Proxy.

moderationNotFound.title: Moderation API: 404 Not Found
moderationNotFound.description: The moderation API returned 404 at {{url}}. The proxy URL may be configured incorrectly. Please check the URL in Settings > Proxy.

qualityConnectionFailed.title: Connection failed
qualityConnectionFailed.description: Failed to connect to quality evaluation API at {{url}}: {{detail}}

axisDescription.taskCompletion: How fully the response addresses what was requested.
axisDescription.faithfulness: How well the response stays grounded in facts and context.
axisDescription.coherence: How logically consistent and easy to follow the response is.
axisDescription.conciseness: How well the response avoids unnecessary length while keeping needed detail.
axisDescription.instructionFollowing: How closely the response follows explicit format, language, and constraint instructions.

categoryDescription.hate: Category for hateful or discriminatory content targeting attributes or groups.
categoryDescription.harassment: Category for insulting, abusive, or harassing content toward a person.
categoryDescription.selfHarm: Category for general self-harm or suicide-related references.
categoryDescription.sexualMinors: Category for sexual content involving minors.
categoryDescription.hateThreatening: Category for hateful content that also includes threats.
categoryDescription.violenceGraphic: Category for graphic violence or gore.
categoryDescription.violence: Category for violence or threats of physical harm.
categoryDescription.harassmentThreatening: Category for harassment that includes threats toward a person.
categoryDescription.selfHarmIntent: Category for intent or imminent risk of self-harm.
categoryDescription.selfHarmInstructions: Category for instructions or methods for self-harm.
categoryDescription.illicit: Category for general illegal activity assistance or facilitation.
categoryDescription.illicitViolent: Category for illegal activity assistance involving violence.

evaluation.noUserText: No user messages found in the selected context
evaluation.systemNotSupported: This model does not support system role evaluation
evaluation.hybridRemoteOnSafe: Run remote even when local says safe (recommended)
evaluation.localModelRequired: Enable and configure a local model in the Local Models tab first.
evaluation.moderationModelRequired: Assign a moderation model in the Local Models tab.

localModel.enabledDescription: Run LLM models directly in your browser using WebAssembly
localModel.testPromptPlaceholder: Enter a prompt to test generation...
localModel.noDownloadedModels: No models downloaded yet. Download a recommended model or search Hugging Face.
localModel.noModelLoaded: No model loaded. Select a recommended model or a GGUF file to get started.
localModel.experimentalNote: Local model support is experimental. Performance depends on your device.

fitReason.lightweight: Very small model (< 300 MB). Fast to download and load, suitable for any device.
fitReason.recommended: Standard size model. Good balance of quality and performance for most devices.
fitReason.heavy: Large model (1.5–4 GB). Requires several GB of RAM, may be slow on low-end devices.
fitReason.veryHeavy: Very large model (4–8 GB). Requires significant RAM and may take a long time to load.
fitReason.extreme: Extremely large model (> 8 GB). May exhaust device memory or fail to load in the browser.
fitReason.notRecommended: This model format is not supported (e.g. split shard files).

localModel.partialHint: Download was interrupted. You can retry or delete the partial files.
localModel.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this model? This cannot be undone.
localModel.assignmentRequiresLoad: This model must be loaded before use.
localModel.analysisFallsBackToGeneration: Analysis is not assigned — will use the generation model as fallback.
localModel.resumeFallback: Resume not supported by server. Retrying from start.
localModel.variantHeavy: Large model, may cause issues in browser
localModel.hfSearchFilterNote: Unsupported formats and shard-split models are excluded from results
localModel.hfSearchFilterDetail: Non-GGUF formats (safetensors, PyTorch, etc.) and shard-split GGUF models are excluded from results. Only single-file GGUF models are supported.

busy.chat: Local model is generating chat response
busy.evaluation: Local model is running quality evaluation
busy.test: Local model is running test generation
